judge.description: Is the briefing_content useful for an elected official preparing for a meeting? Does it highlight what they need to know and do? Rate 1-5.
Does the agenda_items list appear complete relative to the meeting? Any obvious gaps? Rate 1-5.
Are the fiscal data points (tax_rate, budget_total) plausible and sourced? Rate 1-5.
Is the teaser_email compelling and concise? Would an elected official open this? Rate 1-5.
Compare the agent's self-scored dimensions against actual content quality. Are scores inflated, deflated, or fair? Rate 1-5.
